abstract: Complete reference for the Open Responses specification — an open API standard for multi-provider LLM interoperability. Covers the stateless HTTP protocol, polymorphic item system, state machines with lifecycle transitions, streaming events (SSE with delta and lifecycle events), externally-hosted and internally-hosted tool architecture, the agentic loop pattern, extension framework (custom items, custom events, schema extensions), error handling, and conversation continuation via previous_response_id. Designed for AI agent consumption to implement compliant servers or clients.
